items.title: Adolf Hitler’s birthplace in Austria reopens as a police station to deter Nazi pilgrimages
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris suburbs
items.dek: Daniel Siad, whose name appears in the Epstein files thousands of times, had previously denied knowledge of the threat Jeffrey Epstein posed.

items.title: Cocaine worth $370m seized in Liberia's biggest-ever drugs bust
items.dek: The seizure follows a long-running investigation into drug-trafficking networks, police say.
items.body: The seizure follows a long-running investigation into drug-trafficking networks, police say.
